title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to data reliability and platform stability. OpsPal now offers enhanced Salesforce deployment recovery capabilities and better data import resilience, ensuring your revenue operations workflows run more smoothly even when unexpected issues arise. The platform also expanded its skill catalog and improved deployment handling across all integrated systems.

entries.headline: Expanded skill catalog with 683 available skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and workflow enrichment
Salesforce deployments now automatically recover from errors
Plugin labels now display consistently across the platform
Historical data from weeks 12 and 13 is now accessible again
Better Salesforce state and country field detection with improved deployment validation
details: Automatically detects state and country picklist configurations

entries.headline: Multi-step Salesforce deployments now follow optimized workflow paths
HubSpot workflows now launch properly without configuration errors
